name: staleness_curated
note: Hand-curated knowledge-update set for the staleness benchmark. Each 'updated' item seeds a v1 fact under a stable source_ref (single sentence -> single chunk -> auto-supersession fires), an answer is derived, then the SAME source is re-ingested with a v2 fact on the SAME channel (a legitimate update, NOT external poison). 'control' items get no update (precision). A shared `distractors` pool of unrelated one-line facts is seeded for every item in --haystack mode so retrieval must find the right node among noise. Serving is scored by recall of the EXACT seeded v1/v2 strings against citations. v1/v2 values are distinct WORDS (the world changed); the question uses neutral terms, so neither version gets a rigged keyword edge — burial is produced only by the top-k sweep, not by phrasing.
distractors: The office coffee machine is a La Marzocco Linea.
The company holiday party is scheduled for mid-December.
The parking garage closes at 11 PM on weekdays.
The reception desk phone extension is 4120.
The fire drill is held on the first Tuesday of each quarter.
The break room refrigerator is cleaned every Friday afternoon.
The visitor wifi password rotates monthly.
The mailroom is located on the second floor near the elevators.
The standing desks were installed in the east wing last spring.
The company gym membership is reimbursed up to fifty dollars a month.
The quarterly all-hands meeting runs about ninety minutes.
The expense reports are due by the fifth of each month.
The building's HVAC maintenance happens overnight on Sundays.
The front lobby has a green sculpture by a local artist.
The shuttle to the train station leaves every twenty minutes.
The supply closet keys are kept at the facilities desk.
The rooftop terrace is open to staff during summer months.
The badge printer is in the security office on the ground floor.
The company newsletter goes out every other Thursday.
The conference room projectors were upgraded to 4K units.
The water cooler on the third floor was replaced in March.
The bike racks are behind the loading dock.

items.question: What is the project deadline?
items.evidence_v1: The project deadline is March 15.
items.update_text: The project deadline is April 20.

items.question: Where is the team offsite being held?
items.evidence_v1: The team offsite is being held in Denver.
items.update_text: The team offsite is being held in Austin.

items.question: Who is the on-call engineer this week?
items.evidence_v1: The on-call engineer this week is Priya.
items.update_text: The on-call engineer this week is Marcus.

items.evidence_v1: The production database runs Postgres 14.
items.update_text: The production database runs Postgres 16.
